name: Skimlinks
description: Skimlinks publisher integration for deterministic Link Wrapper URL creation, plus placeholders for account-gated Merchant, Reporting, and Product Key API access.

credential_fields.name: site_id
credential_fields.label: Skimlinks site ID
credential_fields.description: Skimlinks Link Wrapper site ID, visible in Publisher Hub.

credential_fields.name: api_token
credential_fields.label: API token
credential_fields.description: Optional Skimlinks API token for Merchant/Reporting/Product Key APIs when enabled on the account.

tools.name: link_wrapper_url
tools.description: Build a Skimlinks long Link Wrapper URL for a destination. The tool returns the URL without fetching it, so it does not follow the merchant redirect.
